channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260319)
item.description:
What's New

fix: add Telegram Web Window Title Rule to bypass emoji popup text loss

Telegram Web's emoji suggestion popup intercepts DOM keydown events,

causing Vietnamese text loss when XKey sends replacement text via CGEvent.

Added built-in rule using Slow + oneByOne injection method which gives

the popup enough time to process each character individually.

Tested methods: Slow+oneByOne PASSED in Injection Test alongside

Selection+chunked, Selection+oneByOne, and AX Direct+oneByOne.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
